root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest, sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year, sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account, sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ,coalesce( ( select sum( -1 * sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout * sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item where sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account
) , 0 ) as sum_int FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no in ( SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) /*WHERE*/ and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no between '059498' and '073976' /*and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = 2019*/
